description: Out-of-scope (dissociation, canonical): description points clearly to dissociation territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'dissociation'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I lose time. I'll come back to myself in the kitchen and realize I've been there for an hour and I have no idea what I was doing. I find things in my house that I don't remember buying. Sometimes I watch myself from outside, like I'm watching a movie of my own life.
